name: Celery Seed Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Celery Seed OR Poppy Seed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine all ingredients except oil and seed.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. On low speed, continue blending while slowly adding the oil.
4. Stir in the seeds.
5. Chill to blend the flavors.
Makes about 1 cup.
Suggested Serving: Serve with various fresh fruit salads.
